description: Invite your patrons to celebrate the pinnacle of the NFL season with our superb email template. Perfect for sports bars looking to promote their Super Bowl viewing party, this service promotion tool is a game-changer. This email template, designed for seasonal promotions, is an excellent way to announce your events and attract a crowd for the most anticipated football event of the year. Get your customers excited about the big game with an engaging and visually appealing email that highlights the thrill of watching the Super Bowl together. Ideal for sports enthusiasts, this template will surely score a touchdown with your audience.
short_description: Promote your Super Bowl viewing party with our engaging email template. Ideal for sports bars, this service promotion tool is perfect for the NFL season's biggest event. Attract a crowd and excite your customers with this visually appealing template. Perfect for sports enthusiasts, score a touchdown with your audience.

designer.description: My name is Darko Kosanin. I like to turn ideas into something visible. I feel great pleasure when I create something new, using various shapes and combinations of colors, fonts and elements into a new and original design. I am also a web developer, so I turn the design into codes with the same pleasure.

html_data:
ENJOY THE BIG GAME WITH
OTHER FANS!

 
Book your seat
 
 
 

BOOK YOUR SEAT FOR THE 2022!

 
 
 

WITH GREAT FOOD,DRINK, LIVE SPORTS / WATCH 
THE BIG GAME TODAY !

 
13/2/2022 3:30 pm
 
Book your seat
 
 
 

BEST BEERS

 
 
 

Bud

$ 225  $ 200

 

Budweiser

$ 185  $ 150

 

Heineken

$ 200  $ 160

 

 
 
 

RECAP 2021

 
 
 
 

Here's a look back at the 2021 We're ready for another 
exciting game and can't wait to cheer your teams on 
with you!

 
 
 
 

LAST CALL!

 
 
 

Date:  13/2/2022

Time : 3:30 pm

Pre Show Starts at 3 pm

 
 
 

WATCH AND FUN!

 
 
 
 
 

This email was intended for information. Unsubscribe from daily digest messages, or visit your
settings to manage what emails beefree sends you.
